title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, December 06 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 06/12/2022
Image reference: 2022-12-06_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-december-06-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Panamax Lowlands Comfort (81,800 DWT, Feb 2016, Tsuneishi Cebu) sold to Unknown European for USD 26.50 mil, VV Value USD 26.50 mil - BWTS. Panamax Fortune Lady (74,800 DWT, Mar 1998, NKK) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 6.00 mil, VV Value USD 7.95 mil - SS/DD Due. Supramax Sagar Moti (58,100 DWT, Dec 2012, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to Far Eastern buyers for USD 17.20 mil, VV Value USD 18.75 mil - SS/DD Passed.
